mapper.select:
SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) FROM NOTICE n LEFT JOIN USER_BASIC u ON n.INSERT_USER_ID = u.USER_ID WHERE 1 = 1
AND notice_type = #{noticeType}
AND notice_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND NOTICE_CONTENTS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND ( notice_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR NOTICE_CONTENTS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND notice_type NOT IN
#{item}
AND NOW() BETWEEN n.START_DATE AND n.END_DATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTICE ( NOTICE_TYPE, NOTICE_TITLE, NOTICE_CONTENTS, START_DATE, START_TIME, END_DATE, END_TIME, INSERT_USER_ID, UPDATE_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{noticeType}, #{noticeTitle}, #{noticeContents}, #{startDate}, #{startTime}, #{endDate}, #{endTime}, #{insertUserId}, #{updateUserId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTICE SET NOTICE_TYPE = #{noticeType}, NOTICE_TITLE = #{noticeTitle}, NOTICE_CONTENTS = #{noticeContents}, START_DATE = #{startDate}, START_TIME = #{startTime}, END_DATE = #{endDate}, END_TIME = #{endTime}, UPDATE_USER_ID = #{updateUserId}, UPDATE_DT = NOW() WHERE NOTICE_ID = #{noticeId}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM NOTICE WHERE ( (UPDATE_DT IS NOT NULL AND ( (UPDATE_DT < #{sortDate}) OR (UPDATE_DT = #{sortDate} AND NOTICE_ID < #{noticeId}) )) OR (UPDATE_DT IS NULL AND ( (INSERT_DT < #{sortDate}) OR (INSERT_DT = #{sortDate} AND NOTICE_ID < #{noticeId}) )) )
AND notice_type NOT IN
#{item}
AND NOW() BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(START_DATE, ' ',START_TIME), '%Y%m%d %H%i') AND STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(END_DATE, ' ', END_TIME), '%Y%m%d %H%i')
ORDER BY CASE WHEN UPDATE_DT IS NOT NULL THEN UPDATE_DT ELSE INSERT_DT END DESC, NOTICE_ID DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM NOTICE WHERE ( (UPDATE_DT IS NOT NULL AND ( (UPDATE_DT >= #{sortDate} AND NOTICE_ID > #{noticeId}) OR (UPDATE_DT > #{sortDate}) )) OR (UPDATE_DT IS NULL AND ( (INSERT_DT >= #{sortDate} AND NOTICE_ID > #{noticeId}) OR (INSERT_DT > #{sortDate}) )) )
AND notice_type NOT IN
#{item}
AND NOW() BETWEEN STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(START_DATE, ' ', START_TIME), '%Y%m%d %H%i') AND STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(END_DATE, ' ', END_TIME), '%Y%m%d %H%i')
ORDER BY CASE WHEN UPDATE_DT IS NOT NULL THEN UPDATE_DT ELSE INSERT_DT END ASC, NOTICE_ID ASC LIMIT 1
